NAME

acds_client_t - ACDS client connection handle.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/acip/acds_client.h>

Data Fields


acds_client_config_t config
socket_t socket
TCP socket to ACDS server. bool connected
Connection status.

Detailed Description

ACDS client connection handle.
